# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all slot definitions aggregated across plugins, with group.member, slot id, plugin, and contributors (the full plugin ids that contribute to each slot) columns.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin slots table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Slots"
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/contributions-table.Contributions`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineFacetTable`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.FacetTableEntry`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.PluginChip`, `primitives/css/cluster.Cluster`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
